html:
Exclusive to:

The Thumper is a Character-specific Structure craftable only by Wagstaff. It is found in the Tinkering Tab, and requires 1 Gears, six Flint, and two Hammers to craft.

The Thumper can be used to destroy nearby Structures, boulders, Trees and uproots plants by creating a shockwave when activated. If the Thumper hits a player or Mob, it will do 30 in damage.

Thumper's destruction radius is 9 units around itself (2.25 tiles) and damage radius is 5 units (1.25 tiles).

Tips

  • The Thumper is an effective way to indirectly kill neutral mobs, such as Beefalo, Royal Guards, or even Moslings.
  • The Thumper's prominent use is to farm trees by planting a bunch of them near the Thumper, waiting for them to grow, and then activating it to harvest all the trees at once. Notably, Palm Trees cannot be renewably farmed using the Thumper, as the Thumper will halve the Coconuts dropped, rendering them unplantable.
  • It can be used by characters other than Wagstaff by placing it as him and switching characters.

Trivia

  • Its design and movement are inspired by the drinking bird.

Gallery

  • Concept art for the Thumper from Rhymes with Play #236.

"thumper"
“Does all the hard work for me.”
–Wilson, when examining the Thumper
“Clears the area without setting things on fire. That's no fun.”
–Willow, when examining the Thumper
“Is pretty good smasher. But Wolfgang is best.”
–Wolfgang, when examining the Thumper
“Cold-hearted metallic destruction.”
–Wendy, when examining the Thumper
“FINALLY SOMETHING THAT UNDERSTANDS ME”
–WX-78, when examining the Thumper
“I'm not familiar with this type of bird.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining the Thumper
“I don't care if it's not a real bird, I still don't like it.”
–Woodie, when examining the Thumper
“Does all my hard work for me.”
–Maxwell, when examining the Thumper
“Delivers a pragmatic shock wave of ground reverberations.”
–Wagstaff, when examining the Thumper
“This metal bird has the förce öf Thör's hammer!”
–Wigfrid, when examining the Thumper
“Woah! That makes a big boom!”
–Webber, when examining the Thumper
“Anything that saves me work is all right with me.”
–Walani, when examining the Thumper
“It's like a meat tenderizer for the ground.”
–Warly, when examining the Thumper
“Fer makin' land waves.”
–Woodlegs, when examining the Thumper
“UNEASY LIES THE HEAD THAT BANGS THE GROUND”
–Wilba, when examining the Thumper
“Thump! Thump!”
–Wormwood, when examining the Thumper
“A boomer to go with my pew-er.”
–Wheeler, when examining the Thumper
The Thumper is a Character-specific Structure craftable only by Wagstaff. It is found in the Tinkering Tab, and requires 1 Gears, six Flint, and two Hammers to craft.
The Thumper can be used to destroy nearby Structures, boulders, Trees and uproots plants by creating a shockwave when activated. If the Thumper hits a player or Mob, it will do 30 in damage.
Thumper's destruction radius is 9 units around itself (2.25 tiles) and damage radius is 5 units (1.25 tiles).
Tips[edit | edit source]
The Thumper is an effective way to indirectly kill neutral mobs, such as Beefalo, Royal Guards, or even Moslings.
The Thumper's prominent use is to farm trees by planting a bunch of them near the Thumper, waiting for them to grow, and then activating it to harvest all the trees at once. Notably, Palm Trees cannot be renewably farmed using the Thumper, as the Thumper will halve the Coconuts dropped, rendering them unplantable.
It can be used by characters other than Wagstaff by placing it as him and switching characters.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Its design and movement are inspired by the drinking bird.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Concept art for the Thumper from Rhymes with Play #236.

The '''Thumper''' is a [[Characters|Character]]-specific [[Structure]] craftable only by [[Wagstaff]]. It is found in the [[Tinkering Tab]], and requires 1 [[Gears]], six [[Flint]], and two Hammers to craft.

The Thumper can be used to destroy nearby Structures, boulders, [[Tree]]s and uproots plants by creating a shockwave when activated. If the Thumper hits a player or [[Mobs|Mob]], it will do 30 {{Hp}} in damage.

Thumper's destruction radius is 9 units around itself (2.25 tiles) and damage radius is 5 units (1.25 tiles).

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* The Thumper is an effective way to indirectly kill neutral mobs, such as [[Beefalo]], [[Royal Guard]]s, or even [[Mosling]]s.
* The Thumper's prominent use is to farm trees by planting a bunch of them near the Thumper, waiting for them to grow, and then activating it to harvest all the trees at once. Notably, Palm Trees cannot be renewably farmed using the Thumper, as the Thumper will halve the Coconuts dropped, rendering them unplantable.
* It can be used by characters other than Wagstaff by placing it as him and switching characters.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Its design and movement are inspired by the [[wikipedia:Drinking bird|drinking bird]].
